_comment: Recorded Apify dataset rows for the Apify ingest adapter test (zero-key, RD-12). Keyed by group; the fake fetchImpl returns the matching array. Rows mirror common Twitter/X actor field names (text/full_text, author{userName}, createdAt, likeCount/replyCount/retweetCount/viewCount) plus an intentional junk field the source layer must FILTER OUT. Synthetic 'Acme Cosmos' data — no real handles.
